metadata.name: vow
metadata.description: VOW Protocol — Soulbound identity, session keys, and stake-backed credentials on X1 Network

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — receives the new stake deposit

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — receives the additional staked lamports

accounts.name: config
docs: close a config account whose layout has changed across a program upgrade.

accounts.name: vow_state
docs: VOW state is NOT closed — it persists as a permanent identity credential.

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — source of withdrawal lamports

accounts.name: authority_profile
docs: Optional authority profile to inherit defaults from.

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — receives the deposited lamports

accounts.name: depositor
docs: Anyone can top up an identity's yield_balance: the user, session key, or a dApp server.

accounts.name: unstake_escrow
docs: an unstake is in progress because the escrow's lamports_owed was fixed at
begin_unstake time and would not include a post-begin deposit.

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve naked PDA — source of SOL to deposit

accounts.name: reserve_pool_tokens
docs: Reserve's ATA for pXNT — must be pre-created (X1 uses a non-standard ATA program;
frontend calls ensureReserveAta() before the first flush).

accounts.name: spl_pool
docs: X1 Foundation SPL stake pool account

accounts.name: pool_withdraw_authority
docs: Pool withdraw authority PDA (derived from pool address by stake pool program)

accounts.name: pool_reserve_stake
docs: Pool's reserve stake account — read from pool account data at offset 131

accounts.name: pool_manager_fee_account
docs: Pool manager fee account — read from pool account data at offset 195

accounts.name: pool_referral_fee_account
docs: Referral fee destination — pass same as manager_fee if no referral program

accounts.name: pool_mint
docs: pXNT mint

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — lamport-only; receives SOL from mints

accounts.name: spl_pool
docs: X1 Foundation SPL stake pool — read at init to set the correct opening share price.
On testnet pass SystemProgram.programId (no-op: price stays at SHARE_PRECISION).

accounts.name: asset_id_account
docs: asset_id PDA — derived from [b"vow_asset", nonce.to_le_bytes()]

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — receives the staked lamports

accounts.name: spl_pool
docs: The X1 Foundation SPL stake pool account.
Address is verified against config.spl_stake_pool so the crank
cannot pass an attacker-controlled account to manipulate the price.

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve — receives SOL after withdrawal, and signs as pool token authority

accounts.name: unstake_escrow
docs: The pending unstake that justifies this withdrawal.
Proves there is a real payout that the reserve cannot currently cover.

accounts.name: reserve_pool_tokens
docs: Reserve's pXNT token account — tokens to burn

accounts.name: spl_pool
docs: X1 Foundation SPL stake pool account

accounts.name: pool_withdraw_authority
docs: Pool withdraw authority PDA

accounts.name: pool_reserve_stake
docs: Pool's reserve stake account — read from pool data at offset 131

accounts.name: pool_manager_fee_account
docs: Pool manager fee account — read from pool data at offset 195

accounts.name: pool_mint
docs: pXNT mint

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — source of yield lamports

accounts.name: calling_program
docs: The calling application's program account — must be executable and in allowed_program_ids.

accounts.name: app_registry
docs: Optional: app registry entry for the calling program.
C-1 fix: seeds enforced at instruction level — caller must pass the registry
for `calling_program`, not a different program's.

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — source of yield lamports

accounts.name: destination
docs: Destination for the yield payment

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: The ephemeral session key must sign this transaction

errors.name: StakeOverflow
errors.msg: Stake amount exceeds maximum

errors.name: NotMatured
errors.msg: Vow identity has not yet matured

errors.name: AlreadyMatured
errors.msg: Vow identity is already matured

errors.name: AlreadyUnstaking
errors.msg: Vow identity is already in unstake state

errors.name: NotUnstaking
errors.msg: Vow identity is not in unstake state

errors.name: InvalidAssetId
errors.msg: Invalid asset ID for this nonce

errors.name: InvalidOwner
errors.msg: Invalid owner — Vow identity owner mismatch

errors.name: SessionExpired
errors.msg: Session is expired

errors.name: SessionInactive
errors.msg: Session is not active

errors.name: SessionInvalidated
errors.msg: Session was invalidated — identity unstaked or re-activated

errors.name: ProgramNotAllowed
errors.msg: Calling program is not in session's allowed_program_ids

errors.name: DailyLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Daily spend limit exceeded

errors.name: LifetimeLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Lifetime spend limit exceeded

errors.name: VelocityLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Transaction velocity limit exceeded

errors.name: InsufficientYieldBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient yield balance

errors.name: AppBlocked
errors.msg: Application is blocked

errors.name: SharePriceOverflow
errors.msg: Share price computation overflow

errors.name: SharesUnderflow
errors.msg: Shares underflow — insufficient shares to burn

errors.name: NoRewards
errors.msg: No rewards available to harvest

errors.name: YieldModeUnchanged
errors.msg: Yield mode is unchanged

errors.name: ProfileNotFound
errors.msg: Authority profile not found

errors.name: ProfileIdTaken
errors.msg: Authority profile ID already in use

errors.name: TooManyProgramIds
errors.msg: Maximum allowed program IDs per session exceeded

errors.name: InvalidStakeAccount
errors.msg: Invalid stake account data

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized — admin only

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: StakeNotDeactivated
errors.msg: Stake deactivation not yet complete — wait one epoch after begin_unstake

errors.name: EmptyReserve
errors.msg: Reserve is empty

errors.name: TreeCapacityExhausted
errors.msg: Merkle tree capacity exhausted

errors.name: StakeAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Pool stake account does not match the validator entry's registered stake account

errors.name: IdentityInactive
errors.msg: Vow identity has no active stake — call recommit to re-activate

errors.name: IdentityAlreadyActive
errors.msg: Vow identity already has an active stake position — unstake first

errors.name: AppRegistryMismatch
errors.msg: App registry account does not match calling program

errors.name: ReserveSufficient
errors.msg: Reserve has sufficient SOL — withdraw_from_pool only callable when reserve cannot cover the pending unstake

errors.name: SharePriceNotSynced
errors.msg: Share price not yet synced from pool — call update_share_price before minting

types.name: CommitmentRecord
docs: V2 — commitment reputation, non-transferable, wallet-bound.
Tracks historical commitment as a pure reputation metric.

types.name: CrGate
docs: Idempotency guard for commitment record instructions.
One PDA per (CommitmentRecord, VowState) pair — prevents re-recording the
same identity more than once.

types.name: SessionAccount
docs: A session key authorization account. The PDA is derived from
[b"session", vow_state, session_index_le4].
session_index is user-chosen (0, 1, 2, …) and is a stable human-meaningful slot.
creation_nonce is copied from VowState.session_nonce at the moment of creation,
making each session's keypair derivation unique even if the same index is reused.
Recoverable Session derivation (client-side, Version 2):

msg = "VOW Session Authorization
Domain: <origin>
Program: <PROGRAM_ID>
Identity: <vow_state>
Nonce: <creation_nonce>
Version: 2"
sig = wallet.signMessage(msg)   // 64-byte Ed25519 signature
seed = SHA-256(sig)             // hash full sig to eliminate seed bias
→ Keypair.fromSeed(seed)

fields.name: session_index
docs: Stable slot index chosen by the user. PDA seed.

fields.name: creation_nonce
docs: VowState.session_nonce at time of creation. Used for Recoverable Session
key derivation — ensures unique keys even when an index slot is reused.

types.name: VowState
docs: Soulbound identity NFT. The owner field is immutable after mint.
The account persists permanently on-chain as a historical identity
credential regardless of stake state. Two lifecycle states:
Active Identity:  active_stake == true   (sessions allowed, yield spendable)
Dormant Identity: active_stake == false  (identity preserved, no new sessions)
Reputation fields (first_staked_at, total_commitments, total_fulfilled,
cumulative_stake_days, highest_class_ever) are append-only — never reset
by unstake or activate_stake.

fields.name: sessions_invalidated_at
docs: Set by complete_unstake and activate_stake to expire existing sessions.

fields.name: active_stake
docs: Active Identity when true; Dormant Identity when false.
Sessions cannot be created and yield cannot be spent when false.

fields.name: session_nonce
docs: Monotonically increasing counter. Incremented by create_session.
Stored in SessionAccount.creation_nonce so any device can re-derive the
session keypair from: signMessage(program || vow || nonce).
Ensures unique session keys even when an index slot is reused.
